scripts.dev:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" RUST_DIFFFORGE_DESKTOP_CALLBACK_SCHEME=diffforge-dev tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json
scripts.build:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri build --bundles app
scripts.package:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri build --bundles app && scripts/package-macos-pkg.sh
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:frontend: node --test src/agents/agentLaunchDefaults.test.js src/app/PaneErrorBoundary.test.js src/app/workspaceProjectInventory.test.js src/audio/voicePipeline.test.js src/loopspaces/graphContract.test.js src/pcb/pcbElementContext.test.js src/tokenomics/tokenomicsAccountIdentity.test.js src/tokenomics/tokenomicsAccountRoster.test.js src/tokenomics/tokenomicsFormat.test.js src/tokenomics/tokenomicsProviderLimitMerge.test.js src/tools/skillsLibrary.test.js src/notifications/notificationPreferences.test.js src/notifications/notificationSfx.test.js src/notifications/workspaceNotifications.test.js src/snipping/snippingAnnotationTargets.test.js src/terminals/appControlOrchestratorRouting.test.js src/terminals/panelAgentPromptBridge.test.js src/terminals/permissionModeAutomation.test.js src/terminals/providerTurnIntent.test.js src/terminals/terminalActivityState.test.js src/terminals/terminalColors.test.js src/terminals/terminalPromptSubmission.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueComposerGate.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueDeviceSwitcher.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueLaneState.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueSources.test.js src/threads/threadTerminalGroundTruth.test.js src/threads/transcript/transcript-diff-hunks.test.mjs src/threads/transcript/transcript-fold.test.mjs src/threads/transcript/transcript-subagent-nesting.test.mjs src/threads/transcript/transcript-turn-diff.test.mjs src/threads/workspaceThreadTranscriptEvidence.test.js src/threads/workspaceThreads.test.js src/video/videoEditorModel.test.js src/video/videoTakes.test.js
scripts.macos:permissions:reset: tccutil reset Accessibility ai.diffforge.desktop.dev && tccutil reset ScreenCapture ai.diffforge.desktop.dev
scripts.tauri:dev:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" RUST_DIFFFORGE_DESKTOP_CALLBACK_SCHEME=diffforge-dev tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json
scripts.tauri:dev:existing:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" RUST_DIFFFORGE_DESKTOP_CALLBACK_SCHEME=diffforge-dev tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json --no-dev-server-wait
